prompt: Build a SaaS app with authentication, dashboard, and Stripe billing. Include backend API, runnable preview, and deploy-ready output.
result_text: I understand this as a deployment task. I’m taking a focused approach so you get one calm, useful result. First I will focus on the task with PlannerAgent, then deploy the app and verify it. If I need any more detail, I’ll ask for it before making changes.
title: SaaS App Build
